name: io.github.marras0914/agent-toolbelt-mcp
description: 19 focused API tools for AI agents and developers. Contract clause extraction ($0.10/call), prompt optimization, document comparison, meeting action items, context window packing, dependency auditing (CVE/OSV), mock data generation, token counting, and 11 rule-based utilities. Free tier: 1,000 calls/month, no credit card.

environment_variables.name: AGENT_TOOLBELT_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your Agent Toolbelt API key. Get one free at https://agent-toolbelt-production.up.railway.app
